This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Leionema hillebrandii include limonoids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
